category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/nim-lang/Nim describes Nim as a statically typed compiled systems programming language.
source_facts.description says Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language.
display_name_sources: Official website https://nim-lang.org/ and repository https://github.com/nim-lang/Nim use the name Nim.
docs_sources: Official Nim documentation is hosted on nim-lang.org under /docs and /documentation.
Official Nim repository points users to the Nim website and bleeding-edge docs.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/nim-lang/Nim is the Nim compiler, standard library, tools, and documentation repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so official repository was determined from official Nim sources.
tags_sources: Official repository describes Nim as statically typed and compiled.
source_facts.description identifies a compiled systems programming language.
source_facts.executables lists nim, nimble, nimpretty, and nimsuggest.
